requirement_topic.en: Authorized Angolan Importer / Local Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 授权安哥拉进口商/当地代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權安哥拉進口商/當地代理要求

summary.en: Importation of radio and telecommunications equipment into Angola requires engagement of an authorized Angolan importer or local agent. The local importer is responsible for submitting the INACOM homologação application, holding the approval on behalf of the foreign manufacturer, handling customs clearance at Luanda port (the primary entry point), and ensuring Portuguese-language documentation accompanies goods. Foreign manufacturers without an established Angolan entity cannot independently hold INACOM homologação.
summary.zh: 向安哥拉进口无线电和电信设备须委托授权安哥拉进口商或当地代理。当地进口商负责代表境外制造商提交INACOM设备认证申请并持有批准，处理罗安达港（主要入境口岸）的海关清关，并确保随附货物的葡萄牙语文件。未在安哥拉建立实体的境外制造商不得独立持有INACOM设备认证。
summary.zht: 向安哥拉進口無線電和電信設備須委託授權安哥拉進口商或當地代理。當地進口商負責代表境外製造商提交INACOM設備認證申請並持有批准，處理羅安達港（主要入境口岸）的海關清關，並確保隨附貨物的葡萄牙語文件。未在安哥拉建立實體的境外製造商不得獨立持有INACOM設備認證。

standards_or_laws: Lei 23/11 — Electronic Communications Law of Angola (INACOM homologação applicant requirement)
Angola customs regulations — Luanda port entry

summary.en: For China domestic market, a China-registered manufacturer or authorised representative typically holds SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL. CCC certification can be held by the foreign manufacturer or their China-registered representative. No mandatory local importer requirement applies for China domestic approvals, though a China business entity is required to submit applications.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，在中国注册的制造商或授权代表通常持有SRRC型式核准和工信部NAL。CCC认证可由境外制造商或其在中国注册的代表持有。中国国内批准不要求强制委托当地进口商，但提交申请须有中国商业实体。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，在中國註冊的製造商或授權代表通常持有SRRC型式核准和工信部NAL。CCC認證可由境外製造商或其在中國註冊的代表持有。中國國內批准不要求強制委託當地進口商，但提交申請須有中國商業實體。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC — China-registered entity required for application
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — manufacturer or China authorised representative

gap.en: Angola requires a locally registered Angolan importer or agent to hold INACOM homologação and clear goods through Luanda customs. Chinese exporters without an established Angolan partner cannot directly access the market or obtain type approval. Identifying a qualified Angolan importer with INACOM registration experience is a prerequisite to market entry. Angola has significant Chinese investment presence (CITIC, CRCC), which may facilitate finding established partners.
gap.zh: 安哥拉要求在本地注册的安哥拉进口商或代理持有INACOM设备认证并通过罗安达海关清关。未在安哥拉建立合作伙伴的中国出口商不能直接进入市场或取得型式认可。寻找具备INACOM注册经验的合格安哥拉进口商是进入市场的前提条件。安哥拉有大量中国投资存在（中信、中国铁建），这可能有助于寻找成熟合作伙伴。
gap.zht: 安哥拉要求在本地註冊的安哥拉進口商或代理持有INACOM設備認證並透過羅安達海關清關。未在安哥拉建立合作夥伴的中國出口商不能直接進入市場或取得型式認可。尋找具備INACOM註冊經驗的合格安哥拉進口商是進入市場的前提條件。安哥拉有大量中國投資存在（中信、中國鐵建），這可能有助於尋找成熟合作夥伴。

source.publisher: INACOM — Instituto Nacional das Comunicações de Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese exporters must engage an authorized Angolan importer or local agent before applying for INACOM homologação. The local importer holds the type approval and manages customs clearance at Luanda. This is a mandatory prerequisite; direct market access without a local Angolan entity is not possible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国出口商在申请INACOM设备认证前须委托授权安哥拉进口商或当地代理。当地进口商持有型式认可并管理罗安达海关清关。此为强制性前提条件；没有安哥拉当地实体无法直接进入市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國出口商在申請INACOM設備認證前須委託授權安哥拉進口商或當地代理。當地進口商持有型式認可並管理羅安達海關清關。此為強制性前提條件；沒有安哥拉當地實體無法直接進入市場。
